intro: Apple removed multiple AI nudify apps from its App Store following legal action over deepfake pornography tools. Widespread coverage of AI industry trends reflects ongoing debate about the technology's societal impact, from educational integrity concerns in Australia to authorcritiques about AI-generated content. China's smartphone makers including ZTE and Honor are launching devices centered on AI agents, with ZTE's NaviX Ultra selling out quickly after its debut.

whitelist.title: AI - Business Insider
whitelist.desc: Explore cutting-edge AI insights and trends with Business Insider's dedicated artificial intelligence coverage. Stay ahead with in-depth articles, expert analyses, and the latest news on AI technologies shaping industries worldwide.

whitelist.title: I interned for OpenAI in San Francisco. Here's what it was like and what I thought of Sam Altman.
whitelist.desc: Hamza Mostafa decided he needed to be in San Francisco to make it in tech. When he landed an OpenAI internship, he felt that decision paid off.

whitelist.title: Apple is finally removing AI apps that can digitally undress anyone
whitelist.desc: Apple has removed several AI nudify apps after legal action accused the company of allowing deepfake pornography tools to remain on the App Store.

whitelist.title: Elon Musk, Sam Altman, Dario Amodei, and other AI leaders as 'Mean Girls' characters
whitelist.desc: If Silicon Valley were "Mean Girls," who would be Regina George? Sam Altman, Elon Musk, Dario Amodei, Jensen Huang, or someone else?

whitelist.title: Dave Eggers told OpenAI staff that ChatGPT was ‘silencing an entire generation’
whitelist.desc: Author Dave Eggers was invited by Sam Altman to speak to OpenAI employees and used the opportunity to lash out at AI slop.

whitelist.title: ANU accused of ‘hysterical’ response to students using AI to cheat as unis scramble to ‘secure’ assessments
whitelist.desc: Australia risks ‘shipping’ intellectual capability overseas if educational rigour not restored, experts warn

whitelist.title: Albanese’s AI speech was a good start. Now Australia must confront these bigger questions | Julianne Schultz
whitelist.desc: The PM’s vision must look beyond datacentres and copyright to questions of capability, security and public benefit

whitelist.title: China is rebuilding the smartphone around AI agents. ZTE's NaviX sold out in hours.
whitelist.desc: ZTE unveiled the NaviX Ultra at WAIC, calling it the world's first agentic AI phone. It runs ByteDance's Doubao. StepFun and Honor showed similar devices.

whitelist.title: Meet Yang Zhilin, the CEO and founder behind China's buzzy new Kimi K3 AI model
whitelist.desc: Yang Zhilin is the CEO and founder of Moonshot AI, a Chinese startup that developed Kimi K3. The Kimi K3 model raised eyebrows in Silicon Valley.

whitelist.title: Another grim portent for our AI policing future.
whitelist.desc: Joel Feder at The Drive reported a frightening story about how Flock cameras, recently suspended by the LAPD, tracked him in Minnesota and sent police after him over “stolen plates.” (They were not.) Flock says its cameras worked “correctly” in the lead-up to a potentially deadly incident. But here we are in our new era of computer policing. [Link: Flock Says Its Cameras Worked 'Correctly' When Police Tracked and Ambushed Me for No Reason | https://www.thedrive.com/news/inside-the-flock-dragnet-...

whitelist.title: The AI rotation stole the spotlight from a strong start to earnings season
whitelist.desc: The AI trade dominated the market once again this week, upstaging an impressive start to the second-quarter earnings season.

whitelist.title: AMD’s next reinvention: A new playbook for the AI era

whitelist.title: AI News, Artificial Intelligence Trends & Market Impact | Fortune | Section
whitelist.desc: Get the latest AI news, artificial intelligence trends & market insights from Fortune, your trusted source for new innovation & digital trends.

whitelist.title: 'I’m an example of what I’ve preached': Dan Ives knows AI has a 'PR problem' but it led to his massive career change after 25 years on Wall Street | Fortune
whitelist.desc: "We're going to look back on this period," the co-founder of Yorkville Ives told Fortune, "and realize this is building the Vegas Strip in 1955."

whitelist.title: A Chinese Pink Floyd fan is giving Claude and Chat their own DeepSeek moment — an AI model just as good and half the price | Fortune
whitelist.desc: Moonshot's founder trained at Carnegie Mellon. Now his Kimi K3 model is beating U.S. giants at their own game — and making Silicon Valley sweat.

whitelist.title: France and Germany pledge to build a European rival to Palantir's military AI software
whitelist.desc: Macron and Merz signed a joint declaration to develop a "European sovereign digital backbone" for defence. France's Arcadia is named as the starting point.

whitelist.title: The White House is now deciding who gets access to frontier AI models, not the labs
whitelist.desc: The Trump administration is dictating which companies can access new AI models from Anthropic and OpenAI, shifting power from tech giants to the government.

whitelist.title: From the world's techiest e-bike to to Apple vs OpenAI drama — these were the 7 biggest tech stories of the week
whitelist.desc: That was... a week

whitelist.title: My teenager hated it when I used AI to create art for my business. She taught me the dangers, and now I quit AI for good.
whitelist.desc: When I showed my daughter the art I created using AI, she taught me how problematic AI really is. Now that I quit AI, our relationship is stronger.

whitelist.title: Warren Buffett warned investors to be careful, calling out gambling in markets and the cost of AI
whitelist.desc: Warren Buffett called out widespread gambling on stocks and the huge amounts being spent on AI. He also discussed his Alphabet wager.

whitelist.title: Will AI fix prior authorization—or make it worse?
whitelist.desc: The government is piloting a program that uses AI for insurance-coverage decisions.

whitelist.title: AI Startups, Solopreneurs, And Actual Numbers
whitelist.desc: AI is making solopreneurship increasingly attractive, enabling lean startups while reducing traditional corporate career stability and appeal.

whitelist.title: AI Storage & Memory From Backblaze, CoreWeave, Panmnesia, Vast And Cloudera
whitelist.desc: AI storage announcements by Backblaze, CoreWeave, Panmnesia and Meta, as well as Cloudera and Vast provide data where it is needed in the AI workflow.

whitelist.title: OpenAI will start notifying parents if their teen has been kicked off of ChatGPT - Engadget
whitelist.desc: OpenAI will send a notification to parents with linked teen accounts if their children have violated its policies around violence.

whitelist.title: Alibaba targets Nvidia’s dominant software ecosystem with open-source AI stack
whitelist.desc: The firm’s chip unit T-Head aims to lower migration barriers to Zhenwu AI computing architectures, following similar initiatives by Huawei and Moore Threads.

whitelist.title: How Google’s New Gemini Rates Work and How to Track Your Usage
whitelist.desc: Now that Google has changed how its usage quotas are tallied, you might not get as many AI responses as you did before.

whitelist.title: Prompt Injection Attacks Are Thwarting AI Hacking Agents
whitelist.desc: “Context bombing” tricks malicious AI agents into shutting down before they can do harm.

whitelist.title: Heralding The Minimal Clinically Important Difference When AI Is Used For Human Mental Health
whitelist.desc: MCID (minimal clinically important difference) is an important technique in the medical field, including mental health. And AI can be used too. It's an AI Insider scoop.

whitelist.title: TSMC posted record $40 billion revenue. Its stock fell 4%. Investors are no longer buying the AI spending story on faith.
whitelist.desc: TSMC raised its 2026 capex forecast to $60-64 billion from $52-56 billion. Record revenue was not enough. The Nasdaq 100 fell 1.4%. The chip index is down 19%.

whitelist.title: Neil Rimer thinks the AI money is coming back out | TechCrunch
whitelist.desc: Neil Rimer, the venture capitalist who co-founded Index Ventures, predicts the historic wealth AI is generating in Silicon Valley will have to be redistributed, voluntarily or involuntarily.

whitelist.title: Google’s AI just recreated the best goal ever by Pele that was never actually filmed
whitelist.desc: Google used live stadium capture, and combined it with archival material to bring Pele's legendary goal to life. The Veo video engine, Gemini Omni, and Nano Banana Pro AI tools tagged alongside in the journey to revive a lost marvel.

whitelist.title: Agentic ID? Vint Cerf Joins Project To Give Every AI Agent A Durable Identifier
whitelist.desc: If my agent talks to yours, how do you know it's mine? How does your agent know? A new project might help with agentic ID ... and eventually trust.

whitelist.title: More and more US employees back forcing AI companies to transfer half of their stock into a public wealth fund

whitelist.title: Businesses are experimenting with cheaper Chinese AI models as U.S. rivals get more expensive | Fortune
whitelist.desc: Lower costs and strong performance are prompting companies to experiment with Chinese AI models, even as security concerns persist.

whitelist.title: The White House is dictating access to frontier AI models, shifting power from tech giants
whitelist.desc: The Trump administration is taking steps to control who gets access to the latest frontier models, sources familiar with the matter told CNBC.
